Home.dashboardDescription: Explore our features and find your perfect match:
Home.mainPageDescription: The innovative dating app focused on emotional intelligence and genuine connection. Explore our features to find meaningful relationships.

AIConversationCoachPage.comfortLevelHelp: Helps tailor the tone of suggestions.
AIConversationCoachPage.styleSuggestionsDescription: Explore different ways to communicate based on the context.
AIConversationCoachPage.adviceCardDescription: General tips based on the conversation flow.

RiskyWordsDictionary.description: Analyze your messages for potentially ambiguous or sensitive phrases before sending.

RiskyWordsDictionary.noRiskyWordsFound: No potentially risky words found in the text.

RiskyWordsDictionary.emptyInputError: Please enter some text to analyze.
